title: Cat on a Hot Tin Roof
writer: Richard Brooks, James Poe, Tennessee Williams
actors: Elizabeth Taylor, Paul Newman, Burl Ives
plot: Brick is an alcoholic ex-football player who drinks his days away and resists the affections of his wife. A reunion with his terminally ill father jogs a host of memories and revelations for both father and son.
awards: Nominated for 6 Oscars. 3 wins & 16 nominations total
